texto: Dennis faced him. They glared at each other again. Neither said a word until Dennis set the glasses down, leaned back against the counter, and folded his arms over his chest. "You're an idiot." "Seems to be a common conclusion. You're not my favourite person right now either.
explicacao: Citação de Sloan Parker sobre temas ligados a amizade. “Dennis faced him. They glared at each other again. Neither said a word until Dennis set the glass…” articula amizade, ex-boyfriends, humor em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e humor.
